blocked_symbol_policy.OKB: OKB is blocked unless Hyperliquid public mainnet metadata confirms active support.
blocked_symbol_policy.PEPE: PEPE resolves to kPEPE and is blocked by default pending unit-semantics review.
blocked_symbol_policy.POL: POL must resolve to active POL; delisted MATIC mapping is blocked.
blocked_symbol_policy.SHIB: SHIB/kSHIB remains deferred pending unit-semantics acceptance.

dashboard_status.date_filters: display-only filter; not canonical evidence; not backend replay

next_phase.decision: PT-RT1.1B may start 24-hour probes-disabled runtime collection

plumbing_lane.approval_text_required: I APPROVE PT-RT1 TESTNET PLUMBING PROBES ONLY. HYPERLIQUID TESTNET ONLY. POST-ONLY UNDER 10 USDC DEFAULT NOTIONAL. CANCEL/RECONCILE REQUIRED. TESTNET FILLS MUST NOT UPDATE STRATEGY PAPER PNL. LIVE TRADING IS NOT APPROVED.

strategy_lanes.label: Money Flow v1.2 baseline observation lane
strategy_lanes.rule_summary: Current production-derived Money Flow v1.2 rules unchanged; control lane only.

strategy_lanes.label: avoid_low_rolling_range_20 evidence-only candidate lane
strategy_lanes.rule_summary: Paper-only candidate that blocks entries when the 20-candle rolling range is too compressed.

strategy_lanes.label: avoid_low_rolling_range_50 evidence-only candidate lane
strategy_lanes.rule_summary: Paper-only candidate that blocks entries when the 50-candle rolling range is too compressed.

strategy_lanes.display_name: MF-ORIG stage filter only full equity
strategy_lanes.label: MF-ORIG stage filter full-equity evidence-only reference lane
strategy_lanes.rule_summary: Current Money Flow-like entries with original-style Stage 2 filter, full-equity comparison sizing.

strategy_lanes.display_name: MF-ORIG Stage 2 pullback reclaim full equity
strategy_lanes.label: MF-ORIG Stage 2 pullback reclaim full-equity evidence-only reference lane
strategy_lanes.rule_summary: Original Money Flow pullback/reclaim hypothesis, full-equity comparison sizing.

strategy_lanes.label: MF-ORIG 1d Stage 2 5/20 crossover full-equity evidence-only reference lane
strategy_lanes.rule_summary: Original Money Flow 5 EMA / 20 SMA Stage 2 crossover hypothesis, full-equity comparison sizing.

strategy_lanes.display_name: MF-ORIG 1D Stage 2 breakout resistance full equity
strategy_lanes.label: MF-ORIG Stage 2 breakout resistance full-equity evidence-only reference lane
strategy_lanes.rule_summary: Original Money Flow resistance-breakout hypothesis, full-equity comparison sizing.

strategy_lanes.label: Wildcard BTC regime guard observation lane
strategy_lanes.rule_summary: Non-BTC entries require constructive BTC 4h and 1d context; BTC entries use BTC's own 4h/1d context.

strategy_lanes.label: Wildcard multi-timeframe alignment observation lane
strategy_lanes.rule_summary: 15m requires 1h alignment, 1h requires 4h, 4h requires 1d, and 1d uses its own baseline rules.

strategy_lanes.label: Wildcard volatility expansion breakout observation lane
strategy_lanes.rule_summary: Block low rolling range entries unless range expansion and a close above the recent 20-candle high occur while baseline Money Flow trend alignment remains valid.

wildcard_btc_regime_guard.purpose: Stop alt entries when BTC 4h/1d market regime is hostile.
wildcard_btc_regime_guard.rule_summary: Non-BTC entries require constructive BTC 4h and 1d context; BTC entries use BTC's own 4h/1d context.

wildcard_multi_timeframe_alignment.purpose: Avoid isolated lower-timeframe entries against higher-timeframe structure.
wildcard_multi_timeframe_alignment.rule_summary: 15m requires 1h alignment, 1h requires 4h, 4h requires 1d, and 1d uses its own baseline rules.

wildcard_volatility_expansion_breakout.purpose: Avoid dead sideways zones but allow re-entry when compression resolves upward.
wildcard_volatility_expansion_breakout.rule_summary: Block low rolling range entries unless range expansion and a close above the recent 20-candle high occur while baseline Money Flow trend alignment remains valid.
